title: Scaphyglottis gracilis
taxonomy: Scaphyglottis gracilis belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. This species is a type of orchid, a group that is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Epidendroideae. The genus Scaphyglottis is a small group of orchids that are primarily found in Central and South America. Scaphyglottis gracilis is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support. Within the orchid family, Scaphyglottis gracilis is classified as a species within the subfamily Epidendroideae.
